snippets.comment: Bui is a kind professor. His class is easy in terms of little homework. I had trouble understanding stats, so I struggled a bit. I think that if he gave more examples in the lectures, I would have understood better. His lectures are short and straight to the point which is why. Other classmates stru

I completed Math 130 with him this summer and found him very knowledgeable and easy to approach. He's always ready to help, and the course keeps you engaged. The exams are tough, but he offers detailed review materials and replies to emails promptly—usually within a day.

If you're thinking about taking his class this semester, I recommend Professor Bui. I took Math 120 with him last spring. He is knowledgeable, approachable, and always willing to help. The course is engaging and the exams can be challenging, but he provides thorough review materials.
